meaning: v.初次公演,初演主角n.初次的演出adj.突出的,杰出的
examples: The premiere on Monday is sold out.
The world premiere took place in August 1956.
The performance will include the premiere of three new ballets.
Meigs, editor in chief of "Premiere" magazine, says there's a method to summer movie madness.
And, Adams says, the premiere audience was more than a little scandalized by it.
